metadata.description: Primary references for Android testing with Espresso, UIAutomator, and Compose Testing.

google_official_docs.name: Android Testing Documentation
google_official_docs.description: Official Android testing fundamentals and best practices.

google_official_docs.description: Official Espresso UI testing framework docs.

google_official_docs.name: Espresso Cheat Sheet

google_official_docs.name: UIAutomator Documentation
google_official_docs.description: Cross-app and system UI testing framework.

google_official_docs.name: Compose Testing Codelab
google_official_docs.description: Hands-on tutorial for Compose UI testing.

google_official_docs.name: Android Test Orchestrator
google_official_docs.description: Test isolation and crash recovery for instrumented tests.

google_official_docs.name: Gradle Managed Devices
google_official_docs.description: Provision and run emulator-based tests via Gradle for CI/CD.

google_official_docs.name: Macrobenchmark
google_official_docs.description: Performance testing for startup and critical user journeys.

google_official_docs.name: Baseline Profiles
google_official_docs.description: Improve runtime performance and startup with baseline profiles.

community_resources.name: Test Automation University: Espresso

community_resources.description: Comprehensive Espresso tutorial with real device testing.
